prompt: Transform the assembly diagram into a colorful pop-art style, highlighting each component with vibrant colors.
prompt_refined: Transform image 1, an exploded assembly diagram, into a vibrant pop-art illustration. Fill each distinct component with a bold, flat, and contrasting color, while preserving and enhancing their clear, strong outlines. Ensure all component labels (e.g., MC253, MC042) remain perfectly legible and are stylistically integrated into the pop-art aesthetic.
objects: Individual mechanical components (e.g., housing, tanks, tubes, levers, base)
Clear, strong outlines defining each mechanical component
Bold, flat, contrasting color fills within each mechanical component
All component labels (e.g., MC253, MC042, ASSMC190, MC234, MC742)
Component labels stylistically integrated into a pop-art aesthetic (e.g., specific font, color, or background)
Dashed lines indicating assembly relationships or pathways
